meaning: adj.分割的,分区的,师的除法的,部门所有的
examples: She is divisional sales manager for the Philadelphia region.
The polis straightens out crooked judgments, gentles the swollen ambitions and puts an end to acts of divisional strife.
Anthony Swanston is a divisional director.
In fact, we have never been authorized to eliminate divisional Weather Service from our organizational name.
Chief Supt Tim Kingsman, Divisional Commander of Kirklees Police, said the march was peaceful.
